channel.title: 2026-04-12 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-12 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Molecular dynamics simulation and machine learning of wettability in the Ag-Cu/ FeCoNiCrMn high-entropy alloy system
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
Publication date: 20 May 2026 Source: Computational Materials Science, Volume 269 Author(s): Jianhong Dai, Siyuan Zhang, Wei Fu, Shengpeng Hu, Xian Li, Han Mei, Zhuolin Li, Xiaoguo Song

item.title: Spatial-adaptive active learning identifies ultra-durable and highly active catalysts for acidic oxygen evolution reaction
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect Publication: Science Bulletin
Publication date: 15 March 2026 Source: Science Bulletin, Volume 71, Issue 5 Author(s): Bin Cao, Yin Qin, Yan Luo, Zhehan Ying, Zilin Yan, Lu-Tao Weng, Kaikai Li, Tong-Yi Zhang

item.title: Theoretical study of TiO 2 phase stability through DFT + U and machine learning
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
Publication date: 20 May 2026 Source: Computational Materials Science, Volume 269 Author(s): Huanyu Xu, Jincang Zhang, Baoyu Xu, Dongbo Dai, Huiran Zhang, Shengzhou Li

item.title: Spin‐Polarized Chiral ZnIn2S4 for Targeted Solar‐Driven CO2 Reduction to Acetic Acid
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yongping Cui, Yuanbo Li, Zhi‐qiang Wang, Xueliang Zhang, Lu Han, Xueli Wang, Jinquan Chen, Aokun Liu, Lu Yu, Changlin Tian, Xue‐qing Gong, Wanning Zhang, Yuxi Fang
Angewandte Chemie International Edition, EarlyView.

item.title: Ab initio investigation of structural stability, magnetic ground state, and mechanical anisotropy of the CoCrFeNi high-entropy alloy

item.title: Stacking-induced type-II quantum spin Hall insulators with high spin Chern number in unconventional magnetism
